title: placement_init
description: Pre-computed scale and placement values produced by initialize_placement.py. World size, centre, and rotation come from parts.json; node_scale and node_origin are derived from component_dims.json. Used to build iterations/001/assembly.json.

root_world_size.description: [width_m, depth_m, height_m] real-world size of the root part, in metres.

root_world_center.description: World-space centre of the root part. Typically [0, 0, height/2] (root sits on world floor at origin).

root_node_scale.description: root_node_scale[axis] = root_world_size[axis] / raw_root_size[axis]. The value set on Blender's node obj.scale for the root part.

config_used.description: Provenance for this file (e.g. source parts.json and root_world_size used).

parts.description: Placement hints for every non-root part. Nested children are under each entry's 'children' key.

parent_world_scale.description: Accumulated world scale of the parent part: parent_world_scale[axis] = parent_world_size[axis] / parent_raw_size[axis]. node_scale is divided by this to keep the child's rendered size correct despite Blender scale inheritance.

world_size.description: [W, D, H] in metres from parts.json. Matches the world_size field in assembly.json.

raw_size.description: Raw GLB bounding-box size in Blender units (≈ metres) before any scale is applied.

node_scale.description: node_scale[axis] = world_size[axis] / (parent_world_scale[axis] × raw_size[axis]). The value set on Blender's node obj.scale so the mesh renders at exactly world_size.

node_origin.description: Local offset on the parent's Blender empty (node_origin). Used by blender_assemble.py.

euler_deg.description: Rotation in degrees from parts.json (source-image pose).

children.description: Hints for grandchildren (children of this part), same schema recursively.
